items.title: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
items.summary: On Monday Iran said it had responded to the latest US proposal and that exchanges with Washington were continuing.

items.title: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
items.summary: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.

items.title: Israeli forces boarding Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
items.summary: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 愛沙尼亞情報首長：普廷深陷俄烏戰爭 推進出奇慢
items.summary: 在俄烏戰爭進入第五年之際，愛沙尼亞對外情報首長指出，由於俄軍在戰場上進展停滯，加上西方制裁奏效，俄羅斯第一季度經濟總量（GDP）萎縮了0.3%，為3年來首次負增長，顯示普廷政權正...…

items.title: 習近平將會普廷  美專家：台灣議題是潛在議題
items.summary: 「川習會」剛落幕，俄羅斯總統普廷將於19至20日訪問中國，並將與中國國家主席習近平舉行會談。美國專家分析，台灣議題可能將成為「習普會」的潛在議題，且中方將尋求俄方擴大石油管線輸送能力，以顯著...…

items.title: 世界衛生大會登場 擬討論漢他與伊波拉病毒疫情
items.summary: 世界衛生組織（WHO）今天於瑞士日內瓦舉行世界衛生大會（WHA），近來一艘郵輪爆發罕見漢他病毒疫情和非洲傳出伊波拉病毒疫情，預料成為此次大會討論重點。  法新社報導，美國與阿根廷今年相繼...…
